saturday.notes: Four routes available — pick your distance!

runs.label: Track Night
runs.workout:
1mi warmup at 6:30pm (arrive earlier for longer warmup)
6:40pm we begin intervals
2x1000 @ 10k pace
400m recovery or 2 min rest
2x200 @ fast pace
200m recovery or 90 seconds
1 minute rest, repeat full set
Bonus cash out: 400m at 10k
1mi cooldown

Modified:
1x1000 with 400m/2min rest
2x200 with 200m/90 sec rest
repeat after 1 min rest
